response:
Nurse Emily has organized a creative writing workshop for 24 residents, dividing them into 4 groups of 6 participants each. Each group will receive 3 writing prompts initially, resulting in $4 \times 3 = 12$ prompts for the session. Additionally, Emily has prepared 10 extra prompts to be shared equally among all the groups, which means each group will receive $10 \div 4 = 2.5$ prompts. Since the number of prompts must be a whole number, we round up to 3 prompts per group for the extra set. This results in $4 \times 3 = 12$ extra prompts. 

In total, Emily needs to prepare $12 + 12 = 24$ writing prompts for the session. The library provides a variety of resources that support the creative process, and the library also offers a space for the workshop to take place. The library is a valuable resource for ensuring that the session is well-supported and that all participants have the opportunity to engage in meaningful writing activities. 

The END.
